org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.factory

Interface CollisionAvoider


  • public interface CollisionAvoider
    This interface represents a collision avoider that is used by the FigureFactory to avoid collisions.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Rectangle2f detectCollision(Rectangle2f bounds, Set<? extends ViewComponent> exceptions)
      Replies the bounds of the figure that is intersecting the specified bounds.
      boolean isCollisionFree(Rectangle2f bounds, Set<? extends ViewComponent> exceptions)
      Replies if the given bounds is free of collision.

    • Method Detail

      • isCollisionFree

        boolean isCollisionFree(Rectangle2f bounds,
                      Set<? extends ViewComponent> exceptions)
        Replies if the given bounds is free of collision.
        Parameters:
        bounds -
        exceptions - are the components to exclude from the collision test.
        Returns:
        true if no collision was found; otherwise false

      • detectCollision

        Rectangle2f detectCollision(Rectangle2f bounds,
                          Set<? extends ViewComponent> exceptions)
        Replies the bounds of the figure that is intersecting the specified bounds.
        Parameters:
        bounds -
        exceptions - are the components to exclude from the collision test.
        Returns:
        the existing bounds in collision with the specified bounds; or null if there is no collision.
